response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Proven full-stack proficiency with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Active open-source contributions and technical leadership through workshops and GISCollective
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization — core required technologies
Experience with AI systems is implied but not demonstrated as production-grade or enterprise-scale
Lacks clear evidence of leading technical discovery sessions or mentoring teams in GenAI contexts
